description: QuantAI ChatGPT/Gemini-Killer Screen Depth - Enhance chat with token-by-token streaming display, code blocks with syntax highlighting and copy button, conversation history sidebar. Add tool execution inline cards showing AI actions. Add multi-modal inputs (image upload, file attachment, voice toggle). Add persona/model switching UI.
steps: 1. Enhance apps/quantai/src/app/page.tsx: Add token-by-token animated text rendering (characters appearing with typewriter effect during streaming), code blocks with language detection header bar showing language name + copy button, markdown rendering for AI responses with proper heading/list/table formatting.

2. Enhance apps/quantai/src/components/ToolCallCard.tsx: Show tool execution as inline cards with icon + tool name + status (running spinner/success check/error X), expand to show input/output JSON, confirm/cancel buttons for destructive actions (e.g., 'Send email to X - Confirm?'), progress indicator for multi-step workflows.

3. Add multi-modal input area to the chat: Image upload button with preview thumbnail before sending, file attachment chip showing filename + size, voice input toggle that shows recording waveform, paste image from clipboard detection.

4. Enhance sidebar in apps/quantai/src/app/page.tsx: Conversation history list with title/date grouping (Today/Yesterday/This Week/Older), search conversations, pin important conversations, delete/rename conversations via context menu.

5. Add apps/quantai/src/components/PersonaSelector.tsx: Persona cards (Helpful Assistant/Creative Writer/Technical Expert/Concise Responder) with icon + description, custom persona creation form, active persona indicator in header.

6. Create apps/quantai/src/components/CodeBlock.tsx: Syntax-highlighted code display using CSS classes (no heavy library), language badge, copy-to-clipboard button with success feedback, line numbers toggle.
acceptance_criteria: AI responses render with markdown formatting, code blocks have copy buttons and syntax classes
Tool call cards show status, expandable details, and confirm/cancel for actions
Multi-modal inputs (image, file, voice) are present in the input area
Conversation sidebar groups by date with search/pin/delete
Persona selector shows available personas with switching capability
TypeScript compiles without errors for all quantai changes
findings: All verification passed. Pre-existing issue: .next/types cache referenced a deleted api/ask route - resolved by cleaning .next directory. The layout prop warning from framer-motion in tests is cosmetic only. Prettier formatted files during lint-staged.
